features.orchestration: Firecrawl integration (Agent 24), Claude Sonnet scoring, matplotlib matrix generation
features.tiers: Starter (4 companies), Growth (8 companies + discovery), Pro (recurring)
features.discovery_methods: G2/Capterra for SaaS, Google search for all industries
features.output: Passes structured payload to Agent 7 for report writing
features.cache: Crawl results cached by domain/date to reduce Firecrawl costs

integration.queue_monitoring: watch_queue() polls queue.json for agent='Competitive Intelligence', status='pending'
integration.input_format: tier, client_name, client_website, market_description, differentiator, named_competitors
integration.output_format: Generates matrix PNG, queues report task to Agent 7
